video_details.title: How to Use Trading Hotkeys to Get Better Trades
video_details.description:
Hotkeys are one of the most underrated edges in trading, and as a former Wall Street trader with over $100 million in verified profits, I can tell you they made a massive difference in my own execution at Trillium, where I never even touched a mouse. In this video, I break down how to build a personalized hotkey system around your most frequent and highest-consequence trading actions, including how I organized my own keys for aggressive entries, emergency exits, and everything in between. You'll learn my five-bucket framework, why left hand means buy and right hand means sell, and how to roll your system out gradually without creating costly fat-finger mistakes. Whether you're a scalper, a news trader, or a swing trader, getting your hotkeys right is a one-time investment that pays off in every single trade you make.

✅ Join my trading course ➡️: https://theonelanceb.com/

ABOUT ME

If you’re new to my channel, my name is Lance Breitstein. I spent over a decade trading equities at Trillium, setting the record for the highest PNL in a single year as their Top Trader. I trained dozens of traders to become successes while managing Trillium’s Chicago office. With over $100m in verified profits, I now spend my time focused on turning good traders into greats and greats into GOATs. Advisor to SMB Capital and mentor of 7- and 8-figure PER YEAR traders. I am to be profiled in the next edition of Jack Schwager’s Market Wizards.

The journey is never easy. Trading is one of the most difficult, but most rewarding jobs imaginable. I am here to help you on your path, wherever that leads you.

May you want it bad enough to overcome any obstacles.
-(The One) Lance B

DISCLOSURE Information shared here is for educational purposes only. This is not investment or trading advice. Make your own independent decisions. Full terms: https://theonelanceb.com/terms-of-service/

Chapters:
0:00 The Scenario That Costs Traders Money
0:49 What Hotkeys Actually Are (And Why I Never Used a Mouse at Trillium)
1:32 The Two Variables I Use to Decide Which Actions Get a Hotkey
2:22 How I Designed My Emergency Exit and Aggressive Entry Keys
3:03 How to Audit Your Own Trading to Find Your Hotkey Gaps
4:01 Prioritizing High-Frequency, High-Consequence Actions First
5:11 Left Hand for Buys, Right Hand for Sells (My Layout Philosophy)
6:43 How Hotkeys Fit Into Your Risk Management
7:30 Build Your System Gradually
8:42 Advanced Hotkeys: AI Agents, Prior Bar Levels, and Vibe Coding
9:27 How to Test and Roll Out Hotkeys Without Blowing Up
